description: The procedure code is inconsistent with the modifier used or a required modifier is missing.
actions: Verify modifier usage against NCCI/Payer rules

description: Claim/service lacks information which is needed for adjudication.
Exact duplicate claim/service.
The time limit for filing has expired.
actions: Appeal with proof of initial submission

description: Charge exceeds fee schedule/maximum allowable or contracted/legislated fee arrangement.
These are non-covered services because this is not deemed a 'medical necessity' by the payer.
The benefit for this service is included in the payment/allowance for another service/procedure that has already been adjudicated.
actions: Appeal with documentation proving separate service

description: Claim/service not covered by this payer/contractor. You must send the claim/service to the correct payer/contractor.
This (these) diagnosis(es) is (are) not covered.
causes: ICD code not on medical policy

description: Precertification/authorization/notification/pre-determination absent.
Deductible Amount.
Coinsurance Amount.
Copayment Amount.
Non-covered charge(s).
The impact of prior payer(s) adjudication including payments and/or adjustments.
